ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forum was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forum was last updated */,
  "forum_type" TEXT /* Type of forum (main or regional) */,
  "parent_forum_id" INTEGER /* Parent forum ID (for regional forums) */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the forum */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color associated with the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum where the topic is located */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  "sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is sticky */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is locked */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags for the topic */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the topic */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies for the topic */,
  "last_posted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last post in the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic where the post is located */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (regular or sticky) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the last edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last active */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation points earned by the user */,
  "signature" TEXT /* Signature of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "join_ip" TEXT /* IP address used when the user joined */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who organized the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (meetup, car show, etc.) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the event */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* Parent region ID (for hierarchical regions) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_topics" (
  "region_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional topic */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the topic is located */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the regional topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the regional topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_topics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was last updated */,
  "reply_type" TEXT /* Type of reply (regular or edited) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the last edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., edit, delete, lock) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "moderation_type" TEXT /* Type of moderation (edit, delete, lock) */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the achievement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the achievement was earned */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (badge, trophy, etc.) */,
  "achievement_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria required to earn the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (user, post, etc.) */,
  "metric_value_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric value (integer, float, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
